components.name: AppHeader
components.note: Full header including title and tabs

layers.name: MeditationsTitle
layers.description: App title 'Meditations' - large serif display font
layers.designer_note: Center-aligned: (768-304)/2 = 232px. Height includes line-height for large display font.

layers.name: BlogTab
layers.designer_note: Grid-snapped from VLM's x=274→272, y=132→136, w=67→72 (padding), h=52→56 (standard touch target)

layers.name: ExploreTab
layers.designer_note: Grid-snapped from VLM's x=407→408. Same height as BlogTab for alignment.

layers.name: BackgroundImage
layers.description: Abstract geometric pattern fills entire card
layers.designer_note: 32px edge margin (standard mobile). Grid-snapped from VLM's 37→32, 217→216, 694→704, 520→528

layers.name: TitleText
layers.description: 'On Creative Constraints' - 2 line title with breathing room
layers.designer_note: 48px text padding from card edge (80-32=48). Width=640 for text container. Height=80 for 2 lines with 1.4 line-height. Grid-snapped from VLM's x=85→80, y=605→600, w=400→640 (FULL WIDTH), h=60→80 (proper line-height)

layers.name: MetadataText
layers.designer_note: 8px spacing below title (680+8=688). Height=32 for single line with padding. Grid-snapped from VLM's y=680→688

layers.name: ThumbnailImage
layers.designer_note: 16px padding from card edge. 160x160 (power of 2, standard thumbnail size). Grid-snapped from VLM's 73→72, 779→776, 171→160

layers.name: TitleText
layers.designer_note: 24px spacing from thumbnail (72+160+24=256). Width to card edge with 16px margin. Height=48 for title with line-height. Grid-snapped from VLM's 269→256, w=420→440 (FULL WIDTH), h=40→48

layers.name: DescriptionText
layers.designer_note: 8px spacing from title (792+48+8=848). Height=64 for 2-3 lines with line-height. Grid-snapped from VLM's 838→848, h=55→64 (FULL ENCLOSURE)

layers.name: MetadataButton
layers.designer_note: 8px spacing from description. Button height=32 (standard). Grid-snapped from VLM's 907→920, w=120→128

components.name: ArticleCard
components.note: Same structure as first card, 16px spacing between cards

layers.name: DescriptionText
layers.designer_note: 8px from title (1008+48+8=1064). Full enclosure with line-height.

layers.name: NavBackground
layers.designer_note: Standard 64px bottom nav height. Full width edge-to-edge.

layers.name: ExploreNavItem
layers.designer_note: Evenly distributed across 768px width with ~24px spacing. Touch target 48px height.

layers.name: MeditationsNavItem
layers.designer_note: Center nav item. Spacing creates visual balance.

layers.name: VoiceNavItem
layers.designer_note: Right nav item. Evenly distributed pattern.

self_review.pass_1_measurements: ✓ Added missing header elements (Meditations, Blog, Explore)
self_review.pass_4_text_enclosure: ✓ Text heights include line-height (48px for titles, 64px for multi-line, 32px for metadata)
self_review.pass_5_designer_approval: ✓ Values a designer would choose (standard margins, grid-snapped, consistent spacing)
improvements_from_v1: Added AppHeader with Meditations title (was missing)
Added Blog and Explore tabs (was missing)
Increased text heights for full enclosure (was too tight)
Applied standard spacing (was using random values)
Increased text widths to proper container size (was too narrow)
